title: Banneton Proofing Basket, 8 Inch Round Bread Proofing Basket with Cloth Liner, Natural Rattan Sourdough Proving Baskets 20 x 8 cm, For Baking Enthusiasts and Beginners
features: 【Premium Quality and Durability】Our banneton proofing baskets are meticulously handcrafted using the finest natural rattan materials. This natural material is not only environmentally friendly, but also effectively maintains the shape of the dough, ensuring perfectly risen and beautifully shaped sourdough every time it is baked.

【With Cloth Liner, Easy to Clean】Our round banneton proofing basket is equipped with a cloth liner, which can effectively prevent the dough from sticking to the basket. The cloth liner is easy to clean and can be reusable.

【Provides Support and Fixed Shape】Natural Rattan banneton proofing basket Provide a Superior Environment for the Dough to Rise, Rattan baskets are sturdy and provide support to the dough as it rises. This helps the bread to maintain its shape and prevents it from spreading out too much.Round bread proofing basket provides a specific shape and structure to the dough, the sides of the sourdough proving basket support the dough and help it rise to a consistent height and shape.

【Absorbs Excess Moisture】Natural Rattan banneton proofing basket have natural moisture-absorbing properties, which can help to remove excess moisture from the dough during proofing. This helps to create a better texture and crust in the final baked bread.

【Widely Use】These hand-woven rattan bread proofing basket are not only suitable for aspiring professional sourdough bakers, but their sturdy and durable construction is also suitable for any baking enthusiasts and beginners. For making round loaves, Natural rattan sourdough proving basket can be easily demoulded during baking for improved baking efficiency.
description: Product Description KUWUNG Natural Rattan Banneton Proofing Basket, Round Bread Proofing Basket with Cloth Liner 8/10 Inch
